query:
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as data,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY DATE(createdAt) ASC
LIMIT 50;
